prose:
The frontier-orbital gap for aniline has been computed.

**Aniline frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`, a single-point calculation (geometry not optimized). SCF converged in 9 cycles.
HOMO = -5.553772 eV, LUMO = -0.2489544 eV → **gap = 5.3048177 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
No warnings were reported.

The calculation integrity was trustworthy.
